control.label: static_global_weights
control.description: In-production global zone-priority weights (lifetime corpus, 10 025 events / 78 pairs).

treatment.label: contextual_weights_plus_quality_score
treatment.description: Session × vol_regime stratified weights plus FVG quality score from D4 enricher.

sprt.rationale: p0=0.55 = lifetime-corpus median family hit-rate; p1=0.60 = +5pp minimum-detectable effect (plan §2.4 G3); alpha=0.05 / beta=0.20 conventional gate; max_n=600 ≈ 30 days at ~20 events/day per arm.

rollback_gate.rationale: G2 rollback rule (plan §2.4): if treatment is worse than control on calibrated_brier in 2 consecutive daily rolling-benchmark runs, automatic revert + GitHub-Issue-Ping.

on_promote: Bump zone_priority_contextual_calibration.json status from shadow -> production.
Append entry to docs/CALIBRATION_DECISIONS.md with the SPRT report digest.
on_reject: Keep static global weights; treatment artifact stays shadow-only.
Append entry to docs/CALIBRATION_DECISIONS.md documenting the H0 acceptance.

data_window.starts_when: scripts/fvg_quality_recalibration.py shadow JSON first reports status=ok with n_fvg >= 30 and acceptance criteria met.
